testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
11:40:02.354 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.kanpo.KanpoApplicationTests]: KanpoApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 11:40:02.410 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.kanpo.KanpoApplication for test class com.example.kanpo.KanpoApplicationTests 11:40:02.458 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.kanpo.KanpoApplicationTests]: KanpoApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 11:40:02.458 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.kanpo.KanpoApplication for test class com.example.kanpo.KanpoApplicationTests

Automatic @Repository and @Entity scanning is enabled. 2026-06-19T11:40:02.928+09:00 WARN 60976 --- [kanpo] [ main] o.m.s.mapper.ClassPathMapperScanner : No MyBatis mapper was found in '[com.example.kanpo]' package. testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3
